reviews.review_text: Great stay
The owner was very helpful, the caravan park is very clean .
Very quiet park with reasonable rates. Near to the Murray River if you like fishing. Handy shop at the reception desk.

Lovely owners, but the park is a permanents park not a caravan park. No water(river water only), no Greywater, no Blackwater. Amenities are very old and need a lot of work but guess that won’t happen because there’s no need! Permanents have no rules, barking dogs off leads and party till after midnight.
It’s a very clean place and the owners are really nice but I wouldn’t recommend it to other caravaners or go back.

Stayed at Riverlander after 5 years,still unspoilt quiet location,great pool & BBQ facilities, with a lot of newbies at back where the boat ramp is situated.Very obliging staff & friendly neighbours.Look forward to my return.Went to Turrumbary weir to take some photos, lovely spot for a visit.
The cabins are great.everything you need.manager is good.very clean and the pool is amazing.we hope to come back.

Great little holiday park. Only 5 minutes from Echuca. Quiet and friendly, with well stocked kiosk onsite. Amenities are older style with a little bit of tile damage but clean and well kept for their age. Women there are enough hooks in the shower so your stuff doesn’t get all wet. You don’t get that very often in modern larger parks. Big thumbs up from us!

Made the decision to stop off on my way back home at Riverland caravan park and stay a night in Echuca. Great facility's no need to go to the supermarket the office has all the food and drinks you would want. The owners were very nice and explained were everything is located. Highly recommend this place to family's and is also pet friendly. I will be staying again on my next trip.

What a fantastic place to stay , staff went over  the expected  and were so helpful...
Would stay there again..

No potable water point, no Grey water dump, no Blackwater dump, showers run out of hot water, holes in the walls of the showers full of mould, Very Expensive at $45 a night, staff were lovely and apologetic.

Clean, friendly caravan park with the owners a delight to deal with. Very accommodating and helpful. Only a 5 min drive to town centre with walking/cycling tracks near by. Cabin was as described with everything supplied. Would definitely return for another visit.
Quiet and peaceful
The floors were very dirty. When we arrived, it was to find that they had not even kept our booking. Would not recommend this one at all.

Stayed a number of times ..so peaceful and relaxing.. Right on the banks of the Murray River and out of town .. ideal park to get some peace and quite .. And the cabin is perfect..comes with everything you need .. Thoroughly recommend..

We stayed for 3 nights in Feb 2024 with friends who also rented cabins & caravan sites. We stayed in a 1 bedroom cabin. It was comfortable for a couple. We stayed over a very hot weekend & the a/c worked well. We enjoyed the pool throughout our stay. Echuca town was a 10 minute drive. Jodie was a very friendly & welcoming host.

We stayed for 3 nights in Feb 2024 with friends who also rented cabins & caravan sites. We stayed in a 1 bedroom cabin. It was comfortable for a couple. We stayed over a very hot weekend & the a/c worked well. We enjoyed the pool throughout our stay. Echuca town was a 10 minute drive. Jodie was a very friendly & welcoming host.
Friendly service, events, peace, amazing location, easy access
Clean, cosy rooms,  decent shower, lovely hostess
Need to invest  in a disable toilet for disable people

Peaceful and relaxing with lots of bird life. || The Park team also went out of their way to assist us with our vehicle troubles-  nothing was too much.  They linked us up with a local mechanic who had us back on the road first thing after the weekend. ||The park is small and bespoke on the banks of the Murray and met our needs perfectly.

Very quiet c/van park, and a good  distance from Highway makes it child friendly has all
Amminates and a nice pool.
Good park but toilets need to be bulldozing no disability toilet or shower I fill they are interested in holiday shacks than caravans
